docs.title: AWS Bedrock Testing & Details
docs.text: Welcome to the technical overview of AWS Bedrock implementation.

docs.title: Service Overview
docs.text: Amazon Bedrock is a fully managed service that offers a choice of high-performing foundation models (FMs) from leading AI companies like AI21 Labs, Anthropic, Cohere, and Meta via a single API.

docs.title: Usage & Implementation
docs.text: To use Bedrock in your application, you can use the Boto3 library in Python.

docs.title: Prerequisites
docs.text:
• AWS Account with Bedrock model access enabled.
  • IAM permissions for bedrock:InvokeModel.

docs.title: Sample Code
docs.text:
```python import boto3

bedrock = boto3.client(service_name='bedrock-runtime')

response = bedrock.invoke_model( modelId='anthropic.claude-v2', body='{"prompt": "Hello Claude!", "max_tokens_to_sample": 300}' )
